allow: Bash(xargs '-I{}' sed -i 's/this.\\$emit\("import", data\);$/this.$emit\("import", data\);/; s/this.\\$emit\("import", data\);\\s*\\n\\s*this.handleClose\(\);\\s*\\n\\s*this.\\$message.success/this.$message.success\("导入成功，共 " + data.length + " 条数据"\);\\n          this.$emit\("import", data\);\\n          this.handleClose\(\);/' '{}')

Bash(find src/views -name ImportDialog.vue -exec perl -i -pe 's/\(this\\.\\$emit\\\("import", data\\\);\\s*\\n\\s*\)this\\.handleClose\\\(\\\);\\s*\\n\\s*this\\.\\$message\\.success/$1this.$message.success\("导入成功，共 " + data.length + " 条数据"\);\\n          this.handleClose\(\);/' '{}' +)

Bash(find src/views -name ImportDialog.vue ! -path '*/template/*' -exec perl -i -0pe 's/\(this\\.\\$emit\\\("import", data\\\);\)\\n\(\\s*\)this\\.handleClose\\\(\\\);\\n\(\\s*\)this\\.\\$message\\.success/$1\\n$2this.$message.success\("导入成功，共 " + data.length + " 条数据"\);\\n$2this.handleClose\(\);/s' '{}' +)
Bash(find src/views -name "ImportDialog.vue" ! -path "*/template/*" -exec perl -i -pe 's/this\\.handleClose\\\(\\\);\\\("导入成功，共 " \\+ data\\.length \\+ " 条数据"\\\);/this.handleClose\(\);/' {} +)
Bash(xargs '-I{}' sed -i 's/console\\.log\("提交\\\([^"]*\\\)":[^\)]*\);/console.log\("提交\\1", this.\\1\);\\n      this.$message.success\("操作成功"\);/' '{}')

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('src/views/扫描任务联动/结果上报/资产备份接口管理/index.vue','utf8'\); console.log\('File length:',c.length\); console.log\('Has BOM:',c.charCodeAt\(0\)===0xFEFF\); const s=c.substring\(0,200\); console.log\('First 200 chars:'\); console.log\(s\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('src/views/扫描任务联动/结果上报/资产备份接口管理/index.vue','utf8'\); const lines=c.split\('\\n'\); lines.forEach\(\(l,i\)=>{if\(i>=155&&i<=162\) console.log\(i+1+': '+l\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('src/views/扫描任务联动/结果上报/资产备份接口管理/index.vue','utf8'\); for\(let i=0;i<c.length;i++\){if\(c.charCodeAt\(i\)>127||c.charCodeAt\(i\)<32\){console.log\('Pos '+i+': char code '+c.charCodeAt\(i\)+' near: '+c.substring\(Math.max\(0,i-10\),i+20\)\);}}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const content=fs.readFileSync\('src/views/扫描任务联动/结果上报/资产备份接口管理/index.vue','utf8'\); const scriptMatch=content.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/\); if\(scriptMatch\){try{new Function\(scriptMatch[1]\);console.log\('Script syntax OK'\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('Script syntax error:',e.message\);}}")
Bash(node -e "const pkg=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('build script:', pkg.scripts?.build\); console.log\('vue-cli-service:', pkg.devDependencies?.['@vue/cli-service']\)")
Bash(find src/views -name '*.vue' -exec sed -i -e s/桂林//g -e s/梧州//g -e s/柳州//g -e s/玉林//g -e s/南宁//g -e s/北海//g '{}' +)
Bash(python -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('\\''Total pages:'\\'', len\(d\)\); levels1=set\(\); levels2=set\(\); levels3=set\(\); fn_count=0:*)

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./module_functions.json'\); const keys=Object.keys\(d\); console.log\('Total pages \(level3 entries\):', keys.length\); const l1=new Set\(\), l2=new Set\(\); let fnCount=0; keys.forEach\(k=>{l1.add\(d[k].level1\); l2.add\(d[k].level2\); fnCount+=d[k].functions.length}\); console.log\('Distinct level1:', l1.size\); console.log\('Distinct level2:', l2.size\); console.log\('Total functions:', fnCount\); console.log\(\); console.log\('Level1 values:'\); [...l1].sort\(\).forEach\(x=>console.log\(' -',x\)\); console.log\(\); console.log\('Level2 values:'\); [...l2].sort\(\).forEach\(x=>console.log\(' -',x\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./module_functions.json'\); const keys=Object.keys\(d\); let byLevel1={}; keys.forEach\(k=>{const l=d[k].level1; byLevel1[l]=\(byLevel1[l]||0\)+1}\); console.log\('Pages per level1:'\); Object.entries\(byLevel1\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1]-a[1]\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\(' ',k,':',v\)\); console.log\(\); let byLevel2={}; keys.forEach\(k=>{const l=d[k].level2; byLevel2[l]=\(byLevel2[l]||0\)+1}\); console.log\('Pages per level2:'\); Object.entries\(byLevel2\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1]-a[1]\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\(' ',k,':',v\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./module_functions.json'\); const keys=Object.keys\(d\); console.log\('Level3 entries with 指令清单 in name:'\); keys.filter\(k=>k.includes\('指令清单'\)\).forEach\(k=>console.log\(' ',k,'->',d[k].level1,'/',d[k].level2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const pinyin = require\('pinyin-pro'\); console.log\(pinyin\('扫描任务联动', { toneType: 'none', type: 'array' }\).map\(s => s.charAt\(0\).toUpperCase\(\) + s.slice\(1\)\).join\(''\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const { pinyin } = require\('pinyin-pro'\); console.log\(pinyin\('扫描任务联动', { toneType: 'none', type: 'array' }\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const XLSX = require\('xlsx'\); const wb = XLSX.readFile\('资产类型一致性排查报表_已修正.xlsx'\); const ws = wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]]; const data = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(ws, {header: 1}\); console.log\('Columns \(first row\):'\); data[0].forEach\(\(col, i\) => console.log\(\\`  \\${i}: \\${col}\\`\)\); console.log\('\\nFirst 3 data rows:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(data.slice\(1, 4\), null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const XLSX = require\('xlsx'\); const wb = XLSX.readFile\('资产类型一致性排查报表 \(1\)\(1\).xlsx'\); const ws = wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]]; const data = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(ws\); const col = '原始设备类型'; const asRows = data.filter\(r => r[col] && r[col].toUpperCase\(\).startsWith\('AS'\)\); const dbRows = data.filter\(r => r[col] && r[col].toUpperCase\(\).startsWith\('DB'\)\); const bothRows = data.filter\(r => r[col] && \(r[col].toUpperCase\(\).startsWith\('AS'\) || r[col].toUpperCase\(\).startsWith\('DB'\)\)\); const asValues = [...new Set\(asRows.map\(r => r[col]\)\)].sort\(\); const dbValues = [...new Set\(dbRows.map\(r => r[col]\)\)].sort\(\); console.log\('AS开头:'\); console.log\('  总行数:', asRows.length\); console.log\('  唯一值:', asValues.length\); asValues.forEach\(v => { const count = asRows.filter\(r => r[col] === v\).length; console.log\('    ' + v + ': ' + count\); }\); console.log\('\\ndb开头:'\); console.log\('  总行数:', dbRows.length\); console.log\('  唯一值:', dbValues.length\); dbValues.forEach\(v => { const count = dbRows.filter\(r => r[col] === v\).length; console.log\('    ' + v + ': ' + count\); }\); console.log\('\\n合计\(AS或db开头\):', bothRows.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const XLSX = require\('xlsx'\); const wb = XLSX.readFile\('资产类型一致性排查报表 \(1\)\(1\).xlsx'\); const ws = wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]]; const data = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(ws\); const col = '原始设备类型'; const arRows = data.filter\(r => r[col] && r[col].toUpperCase\(\).startsWith\('AR'\)\); const dbRows = data.filter\(r => r[col] && r[col].toUpperCase\(\).startsWith\('DB'\)\); const bothRows = data.filter\(r => r[col] && \(r[col].toUpperCase\(\).startsWith\('AR'\) || r[col].toUpperCase\(\).startsWith\('DB'\)\)\); const arValues = [...new Set\(arRows.map\(r => r[col]\)\)].sort\(\); const dbValues = [...new Set\(dbRows.map\(r => r[col]\)\)].sort\(\); console.log\('AR开头:'\); console.log\('  总行数:', arRows.length\); console.log\('  唯一值:', arValues.length\); arValues.forEach\(v => { const count = arRows.filter\(r => r[col] === v\).length; console.log\('    ' + v + ': ' + count\); }\); console.log\('\\nDB开头:'\); console.log\('  总行数:', dbRows.length\); console.log\('  唯一值:', dbValues.length\); dbValues.forEach\(v => { const count = dbRows.filter\(r => r[col] === v\).length; console.log\('    ' + v + ': ' + count\); }\); console.log\('\\n合计\(AR或DB开头\):', bothRows.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const XLSX = require\('xlsx'\); const wb = XLSX.readFile\('资产类型一致性排查报表 \(1\)\(1\).xlsx'\); const ws = wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]]; const data = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(ws\); const col = '原始设备类型'; const uniqueValues = [...new Set\(data.map\(r => r[col]\).filter\(v => v\)\)].sort\(\); console.log\('所有唯一值 \(' + uniqueValues.length + '\):'\); uniqueValues.forEach\(v => console.log\('  ' + v\)\);")
